role_summary: the gst officer / consultant ensures compliance with gst laws and supports assessment,  audit, and advisory functions.
responsibilities: • assess gst returns and filings   • conduct gst audits and inspections   • handle gst assessments, notices, and disputes   • advise on gst compliance and interpretation   • support enforcement and revenue functions   • ensure  adherence to gst laws and procedures
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong knowledge of gst laws and procedures   • analytical and regulatory interpretation skills
